sentence: A pell booper who stumbles into their rendezboo will spend the rest of their life wondering if they were ready for it.

wombos.definition: Someone who dates around a lot — a pell bepper who hops between boos rather than besties. The romantic, date-hopping counterpart to the universally-liked pell bepper.
A romantic rendezvous with your boo. Used in place of 'rendezvous' when it's with someone you're into: 'your rendezboo, your serendookie.'
